title: Cracking the code: social data access and the DSA's impact on disinformation research
snippet: This article, co-authored by Fabio Giglietto and Massimo Terenzi, discusses the impact of the Digital Services Act (DSA) on social media research and data access for studying disinformation, algorithmic bias, and content moderation. It's part of the PROMPT series.
description: This article, co-authored by Fabio Giglietto, discusses the impact of the Digital Services Act (DSA) on social media research and data access, aligning with his expertise in disinformation research and social media analysis.

title: DIGITAL SOCIAL NETWORK ANALYSIS - Lecturer: Fabio Giglietto - A.Y. 2025/2026 - Uniurb
snippet: Course description for Digital Social Network Analysis taught by Fabio Giglietto at the University of Urbino, covering methodologies for analyzing digital social environments, data collection from the web and social media, and data exploration using R and Gephi.
description: This is a course description for Digital Social Network Analysis at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, taught by Fabio Giglietto, covering methodologies for analyzing digital social environments.

title: GENERATIVE AI AND THE MEDIA - Lecturer: Fabio Giglietto - A.Y. 2025/2026 - Credits 6
snippet: Course description for Generative AI and the Media taught by Fabio Giglietto, focusing on understanding and critically analyzing the impact of generative AI on the contemporary media system, content production, circulation, and consumption.
description: This Uniurb course description confirms that Fabio Giglietto is lecturing on "Generative AI and the Media" for the A.Y. 2025/2026, which relates to his expertise in social media analysis and disinformation, particularly in the context of generative AI.
